description: HubSpot CRM: contacts, deals, tickets, line items, properties, marketing, files, workflows, threads
name: io.github.mindstone/mcp-server-hubspot

environmentVariables.description: Account selector — one MCP process per HubSpot account
environmentVariables.name: HUBSPOT_ACCOUNT_EMAIL

environmentVariables.description: Workspace root for local file tools (required only when invoking upload/attach tools)
environmentVariables.name: MCP_WORKSPACE_PATH

environmentVariables.description: Source attribution label applied to new records
environmentVariables.name: HUBSPOT_SOURCE_LABEL

environmentVariables.description: Set to 1 to disable token refresh on this surface (use on cloud so desktop remains the sole refresh authority)
environmentVariables.name: HUBSPOT_DISABLE_REFRESH

environmentVariables.description: Set to 1 to allow refresh on the cloud surface even when HUBSPOT_DISABLE_REFRESH=1 (escape hatch)
environmentVariables.name: HUBSPOT_ALLOW_CLOUD_REFRESH

environmentVariables.description: Outbound HTTP request timeout in milliseconds (max 300000 = 5 min)
environmentVariables.name: HUBSPOT_REQUEST_TIMEOUT_MS

environmentVariables.description: OAuth scope tier — 'readonly' or 'full'. Overrides the per-account stored tier
environmentVariables.name: HUBSPOT_SCOPE_TIER

environmentVariables.description: Stale-lock detection threshold for the credential refresh mutex (advanced)
environmentVariables.name: HUBSPOT_REFRESH_LOCK_STALE_MS

title: HubSpot
